name: SYNOVIAL CYST
definition: BAKER CYST synovial cyst in the posterior aspect of knee joint communicating with posterior joint

demographics.Prevalence: 19% in general orthopedic patients; 61% in patients with rheumatoid arthritis

discriminating_features: well-outlined hypointense collection on T1WI + hyperintense on T2WI
smooth contour extending along fascial planes (usually between gastrocnemius +
